title: Save money with Student ID #savemoney #finance #students #finsaheli #savings
description:
Here is the list : 
1. Apple - Special education pricing on MacBooks, iPads, and accessories
2. Adidas - 20% off on sportswear and footwear
3. H&M - 10% off for students
4. Zara - Occasional 10% off for students
5. Myntra - Extra 10% off on select fashion and lifestyle products
6. Adobe Creative Cloud - Up to 60% off on all apps
7. Grammarly Premium - Up to 50% off
8. Spotify Premium - 50% off
9. YouTube Premium - 40% off
10. IndiGo - 6% off base fares and 10 kg extra baggage allowance
11. SpiceJet - Special student fares and extra baggage allowance
12. IRCTC - Up to 50% off on train tickets
13. Levi's - 15% off
14. Forever 21 - 10% off
15. Puma - 10-20% off via Student Beans
16. Nike - 10% off via UNiDAYS
17. ASOS - 10% off for students via UNiDAYS
